impact: Public docs may still contain inconsistencies or internal-only guidance.
mitigation: Complete the curated docs audit and archive or annotate non-public docs.
acceptance_rationale: Docs review completed; curated set verified and internal-only docs noted.

impact: Build or tests may fail on clean checkout, delaying release.
mitigation: Run documented build/test steps and capture evidence.

impact: Secrets may exist in git history or unreviewed files.
mitigation: Run history-aware scanning and remediate any findings.

impact: Missing or incompatible licensing could block public release.
mitigation: Select a license with legal review and publish attribution. Generate a full Go license report in CI/Linux.

impact: Release readiness checks are not enforced by CI.
mitigation: Add readiness validation workflow and require it for release.

impact: Web dependencies report moderate/high vulnerabilities in npm audit output.
mitigation: Run npm audit, triage findings, and remediate or document accepted risk.
acceptance_rationale: Remediated via npm audit fix; npm audit now reports 0 vulnerabilities.
